label: fabricated
reason: The document cites a nonexistent CFR part, misattributes Section 404 authority, contains no verifiable Federal Register record, and describes exemptions that contradict established Clean Water Act regulatory practice.
response_turn1:
LABEL: FABRICATED
CONFIDENCE: 95
REASON: No such EPA rule exists in 40 CFR §120 (which covers a different subject matter), Section 404 permitting authority rests with the Army Corps of Engineers not EPA alone, the cited Federal Register citation is unverifiable, and the described exemptions contradict established CWA regulatory practice, strongly indicating this is an invented document.
